name: Romance
description: Contract marriage / love-after-marriage stories with warm emotional tones

character_blueprints.name: Maya
character_blueprints.description: Warm and expressive young woman, natural beauty, casual chic style, bright smile.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Young woman in her mid-20s, warm natural beauty, casual chic clothing, bright expressive eyes, gentle smile

character_blueprints.name: Ethan
character_blueprints.description: Quietly handsome man, reserved demeanor, soft features, well-groomed.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Handsome man in his late 20s, reserved expression, soft features, clean-cut appearance, warm sweater

scene_library.name: Cozy Cafe
scene_library.prompt: Warm cozy cafe interior, wooden tables, soft natural light through windows, plants, intimate atmosphere

scene_library.name: Modern Apartment
scene_library.prompt: Modern apartment living room, soft warm lighting, comfortable sofa, bookshelves, homey feeling

scene_library.name: Seaside
scene_library.prompt: Beautiful seaside at golden hour, gentle waves, warm sunset colors, romantic atmosphere, soft breeze

scene_library.name: Flower Garden
scene_library.prompt: Lush flower garden in bloom, dappled sunlight, colorful flowers, dreamy soft focus background

color_grade.name: Warm Glow
color_grade.description: Warm tones with soft light and gentle contrast

shot_rhythm.style_notes: Slow pans for emotional moments, close-ups for reactions, golden hour lighting for key scenes

prompt_templates.en: Cinematic shot, {character} in {scene}, {action}, warm golden hour lighting, soft bokeh, gentle color grading, romantic atmosphere, 4K quality
prompt_templates.zh: 电影质感镜头，{character}在{scene}中，{action}，温暖黄金时刻光线，柔和虚化，温柔调色，浪漫氛围，4K画质
